name: Pineapple Angel Food Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple tidbits and reserve 1 cup of juice. Set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the instant pudding mix, reserved juice, and milk. Beat at a low speed with an electric mixer for 2 minutes or until thickened. Fold in the sour cream and pineapple tidbits.
3. Place about one-third of the cake cubes in the bottom of a 16-cup glass bowl. Drizzle with 2 to 3 tablespoons of the remaining reserved pineapple juice. Optionally, drizzle with rum.
4. Spoon about one-third of the pudding mixture over the cake. Repeat this process twice, ending with the pudding mixture.
5. Cover and chill for at least 3 hours.
6. Just before serving, spread the top with whipped topping. Garnish with mint leaves and pineapple slices if desired.
